title: How do you change the color of a specific columb date in the calendar widget when there are multiple dates within one item?

posts.author: chadb (Chad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2024-02-06 2113501644×577 71.9 KB

I have an item with 3 specific dates which I would like to be different colors on that calendar.
I have tried adjusting the settings within the calendar and within the columns with no luck.
For example, I have an event that spans from the 13th through the 16th… But the setup for the event takes place on the 12th and the breakdown takes place on the 17th.
I would like to change the color of the 12th and the 17th, but they all seem to merge into the same color.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chad,

I am afraid this isn’t currently possible. At this time you are able to colour by the options provided in the dropdown, however customising by the specific day/date isn’t supported at this stage. Sorry for the inconvenience chad!
